PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-02-2024 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael Woods, Esq., via Zoom, for Stacie Pascal, Petitioner.

At the outset, counsel updates the court as to the status of the bank accounts and confirms receipt of the Examiner's notes. The court reminds counsel attorney that a 12251 petition to terminate the probate for lack of assets subject to administration must be filed, with a corrected $0 inventory and appraisal, to close this case. Counsel agrees with the court's reminder and advises of his intent to follow the court's instructions. The court and counsel agree to continue the subject matter and the pending accounting petition calendared for Jan-31-2024. Counsel is instructed to file his 12251 petition, include the agreed upon continued date in the caption and include a note for the filing clerk in the caption stating that the hearing date has been approved by Judge Murphy.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Feb-13-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The pending hearing on accounting, currently set for Jan-31-2024, will be continued to the same date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Jaime/Reed. Not Reported. ?

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods appeared via zoom for Stacie Pascal (petitioner).

Mr. Woods stated that he will file an ex parte spousal petition, that he requests 45 to 60 days' continuance. Verified petition for final distribution on first and final account is continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods, in person, for Stacie Pascal, Petitioner.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-09-1999 is admitted to probate. Stacie Pascal is appointed Executor of the estate with no authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-06-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
